briefings.title: Briefings
briefings.description: Manual-first daily briefs and follow-up chat grounded in the persisted article corpus.
briefings.noBriefingsYet: No briefings yet. Generate one to create a saved morning desk.
briefings.noBriefingsEmpty: No saved briefings yet. Generate the first manual briefing from the stored article corpus.
briefings.generatedFrom: Generated {date} from the stored article corpus.
briefings.configureTelegram: Configure Telegram in Brief Automation first
briefings.chatEmptyState: Ask what changed, which stories matter most, or how the themes connect.
briefings.chatPlaceholder: Ask about the briefing, themes, or top stories
briefings.prompt1: What are the biggest risks in this briefing?
briefings.prompt2: Which two stories are likely to evolve next?
briefings.prompt3: Summarize the briefing for a 60-second update.
briefings.prompt4: Show how the top themes connect across categories.
briefings.automationDescription: Choose when to auto-generate the daily brief and optionally push the current saved briefing to Telegram.
briefings.autoGenHelp: Automatic generation runs when the app is open and the current time passes one of these slots.
briefings.telegramHelp: The pushed message uses the current saved briefing summary and top stories.

settings.title: Settings
settings.customPromptPlaceholder: e.g. You are an expert analyst. Summarize this article in 3 bullet points.
settings.customPromptHelp: Overrides the default AI instruction. Use {{title}} and {{content}} as placeholders.

keywordAlerts.description: Highlight article titles that contain these keywords.

search.title: Search
search.subtitle: Saved article search rules
search.savedRulesEmpty: Save a search to reuse your keyword rules later.
search.articleSearchDesc: Search your stored corpus with comma-separated keywords. Example:
search.emptyDesc: Results include title, article snippet, source title, extracted themes, and entities from the local intelligence database.
search.enterKeywords: Enter one or more keywords separated by commas.
search.runBeforeSaving: Run or enter a search before saving it.
search.saveResultsToDatabase: Save all search results to database
search.noResultsToSave: No search results to save. Run a search first.
search.selectRuleFirst: Save the search rule first before generating a briefing
search.generateBriefingFromSearch: Generate AI briefing from saved search results
search.briefingGeneratedSuccess: Briefing generated successfully! Check the briefings page.

addFeed.title: Add Feed
addFeed.enterUrl: Enter the URL of any RSS or Atom feed
addFeed.invalidOpml: Invalid OPML file. Please check the format.
addFeed.noFeedsInOpml: No RSS feeds found in this OPML file.
addFeed.importHelp: Choose to import all feeds into one column or create separate columns by category

addColumn.title: Add Column
addColumn.enterUrl: Enter the URL of any RSS or Atom feed
addColumn.invalidOpml: Invalid OPML file. Please check the format.
addColumn.noFeedsInOpml: No RSS feeds found in this OPML file.
addColumn.importHelp: Import feeds from Feedly, Inoreader, Google Reader, etc.

article.aiSummaryDisabled: AI Summary is disabled. Enable it in Settings.

intelligence.title: Intelligence
intelligence.subtitle: NLP pipeline overview of the stored article corpus.
intelligence.selectCountry: Select a country or city on the map to inspect coverage.
intelligence.noStorylines: Not enough related coverage yet to form storylines.

bookmarks.title: Bookmarks
bookmarks.noBookmarksDesc: Click the bookmark icon on any article to save it

landing.heroSubtitle: A privacy-first RSS reader designed for power users. Run it on your NAS, Home Server, or Local PC with zero-cloud AI summarization powered by Ollama.
landing.networkSovereigntyDesc: Runs entirely on your LAN. Access via VPN or local IP. You own the hardware.
landing.localFirstAiDesc: Leverages Ollama to run LLMs on your machine. Instant offline AI summaries.
landing.homeServerDesc: Docker ready for ARM and x86.
